    Description

    Player model for the left side.

    Methods in component.scene2 with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    Scene2.handleGameOver(Player winner, Player loser)
    Handles end-of-match state transition and optional loser death animation.
    void
    Scene2.showFloatingText(Player target, int amount, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, String prefix)
    Shows a temporary floating label above a target (damage/heal indicator).
    private void
    Scene2.showVictoryOverlay(Player winner)
    Builds and animates the final victory/draw overlay.

    void
    HybridClass.startAttack(Player self)
    Initializes hybrid attack animation state.
    void

    Initializes melee attack animation state.
    void
    RangedClass.startAttack(Player self)
    Initializes ranged attack animation state.
    final void
    RangedClass.tryAttack(Player self, float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight)
    Template attack entry that enforces ammo/cooldown rules before spawning projectile.
    void
    HybridClass.updateAttack(Player self)
    Updates hybrid attack animation progression.
    void
    MeleeClass.updateAttack(Player self)
    Updates melee animation frame progression.
    void
    RangedClass.updateAttack(Player self)
    Updates ranged attack animation and resets state after frame duration.

  • Uses of Player in logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters

    Methods in logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Barista.attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
    Spawns a coffee projectile attack.
    void
    Exorcist.attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
    Fires a bullet projectile if shooting constraints pass.
    void
    Barista.startAttack(Player self)
    No explicit attack animation start behavior for this character.
    void
    Exorcist.startAttack(Player self)
    Exorcist does not use frame-based start animation here.
    void
    Barista.updateAttack(Player self)
    No explicit per-frame attack animation update for this character.
    void
    Exorcist.updateAttack(Player self)
    Immediately returns player to walk state.
    void
    Vampire.updateAttack(Player self)
    Updates animation and marks strike frame for combat handling.

  • Uses of Player in logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters

    Methods in logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Hammer.updateAttack(Player self)
    Updates animation and flags strike frame for hit processing.
    void
    Katana.updateAttack(Player self)
    Updates animation and triggers hit state on strike frame.
    void
    Pyro.updateAttack(Player self)
    Updates animation and immediately flags strike frame.

  • Uses of Player in logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters

    Methods in logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Archer.attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player player)
    Not used directly; ranged attacks should go through tryAttack.
    void
    Bubble.attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player player)
    Not used directly; ranged attacks are spawned via tryAttack.
    void
    Mage.attack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player player)
    Not used directly; ranged attacks should be routed via tryAttack.
    protected void
    Archer.spawnRangedAttack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
    Spawns arrow projectile with slight vertical random spread.
    protected void
    Bubble.spawnRangedAttack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
    Spawns a burst of bubbles with varied scale/speed/range values.
    protected void
    Mage.spawnRangedAttack(float startX, float startY, boolean facingRight, Player p)
    Spawns tarot projectile and applies card-specific effects before firing.
    void
    Archer.startAttack(Player self)
    Delegates to ranged base start behavior.
    void
    Bubble.startAttack(Player self)
    Starts Bubble attack by setting strike state and blower timer.
    void
    Mage.startAttack(Player self)
    Delegates start behavior to ranged base class.
    void
    Bubble.updateAttack(Player self)
    Hides blower sprite after configured duration and resets attack state.
